When clicking on the link, I'm not able to see any steps (see below). Is there any way to post the steps onto here, if it's not too much trouble, Thanks again.

entry.title: How can I as a business owner buy an SAP Learning subscription for an employee of my company?
entry.content:
I have succeeded in ordering an SAP Learning Hub subscription for an employee and he did successfully obtain a course certificate in the first year. Now I want to enrol another employee, but when I login I see my subscription is not valid anymore. Meanwhile my company is sent dunning notices for the second year of the subscription.

I have tried several times (7) to correspond with the SAP Store support team on an issue with SAP Learning Hub, was assigned a ticket number but they never even bothered to answer. Why is their support this bad?

Can anyone tell me the correct procedure of buying an SAP Learning subscription for an employee of my company? 

Best regards,
Fred van de langenberg

entry.title: ABAP RAP managed scenario dumping CX_CSP_ACT_INTERNAL
entry.content:
After using the application with no errors for quite some time now. I can't edit one of my existing records because it throws this dump. From my debugging I can see it retrieves 2 records from the corresponding draft table. Even after deleting all records from the corresponding draft table. Seems like it throws the error because it's finding 2 records and assigning it to <lt_draft>.

 

Error information:
A data record is to be inserted even though a data record with the same primary key or same unique secondary key exists.

Information on where terminated
The termination occurred in ABAP program or include "CL_CSP_ACT_DRAFT_OP_ON_DB=====CP", in "LIF_DB_ACCESS~COPY_ACTIVE_TO_DRAFT". The
main program was "SAPMSSY4".

In the source code, the termination point is in line 176 of include "CL_CSP_ACT_DRAFT_OP_ON_DB=====CCIMP".
include "CL_CSP_ACT_DRAFT_OP_ON_DB=====CCIMP".

CATCH cx_sy_open_sql_db INTO DATA(lx_sql).

RAISE SHORTDUMP NEW cx_csp_act_internal( textid = cx_csp_act_internal=>select_open_sql_db

previous = lx_sql )->enrich( ).

ENDTRY.

 

 

TRY.

io_sql_access->if_csp_sql_write_access~insert_from_itab( iv_persistence_name = iv_draft_persistence_name

it_instance = <lt_draft> ). Here <lt_draft> has 2 records which is causing the error. While the draft table is empty...

CATCH cx_sy_open_sql_db INTO lx_sql.

RAISE SHORTDUMP NEW cx_csp_act_internal( textid = cx_csp_act_internal=>save_open_sql_db

persistence_table = iv_draft_persistence_name

previous = lx_sql )->enrich( ).

ENDTRY.

 

ENDMETHOD.

 

ENDCLASS.

entry.title: Re: PDF Sending to REST API with JavaScript in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi @Jagadeesh21,
May I know have you solved the local file issue? The local file works on computer but fails on my mobile phone, not sure what the reason.
Let me know then, thank you!

entry.title: Re: What's the meaning of "DB: Fetch" versus "Fetch" in SAT? (also: Open)
entry.content: For the DB statements, the gross and net time are identical, but not for the single fetch. So I assume that the non-DB statements are relevant to the ABAP statement. Look at the first 2 lines: Abap Gross 30s / Net 10s, followed by DB for 20s / 20s, so basically the fetch statement required 30s, 20s are related to the exchange with the database server and 10s are related to data processing in the application server?

entry.title: Investment order and asset creation
entry.content:
Team

With pm investment order we can create a single asset but there are scenarios where an investment can lead to creation or update of a small asset hierarchy e.g installing 5 pumps in a single location or rebuilding . In existing scenario there is no provision to create or update a asset hierarchy from within work order or on technical completion of work order .               Is there any roadmap for a greater integration 

 The process involves creation of floc and equipment seperately as of now

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Different profit center in sales order, but billing d...
entry.content: Check SAP Note 2195357
